basic_details.job_title: Telangana Anganwadi Teacher & Helper Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 179 Posts in Nizamabad District
basic_details.department: Women Development, Child Welfare, Disabled & Senior Citizens Dept, Nizamabad
basic_details.short_information: The Telangana Government's Department of Women Development, Child Welfare & Disabled and Senior Citizens has officially released a recruitment notification for Anganwadi Teacher (AWT) and Anganwadi Helper (AWH - ST Vacancies) posts in Nizamabad district, offering a great opportunity for local women candidates to work in the Integrated Child Development Services (ICDS) projects.

important_dates.raw: Starting Date for Apply Online: 08-07-2026 Last Date for Apply Online: 23-07-2026 Document Verification at ICDS Project Offices: 27-07-2026 to 05-08-2026

qualification.education_qualification: Intermediate (12th) pass; 10th pass considered if eligible candidates unavailable

vacancy_details.details: The department is filling vacancies at Anganwadi Centres (AWCs) across the district. The vacancy break-up is as follows: Anganwadi Teacher (AWT): 76 posts Anganwadi Helper (AWH): 103 posts (majority reserved for ST category, largely in Thanda/tribal hamlet areas) Project-wise AWCs include: ICDS Armoor, ICDS Bheemgal, ICDS Bodhan, ICDS Dichpally, and ICDS Nizamabad, with individual vacancies notified against specific Anganwadi Centre codes (AWC ID) and reservation categories (OC, BC-A/B/C/D/E, SC, ST, EWS, Ex-Servicemen, VH, HH, etc.)

selection_process: Merit list prepared out of total 70 marks based on qualifying certificate Additional weightage marks: Widow / Divorced / Abandoned women: 5 marks Orphan (as per JJ Act 2015): 5 marks Disabled candidates: 5 marks District Selection Committee Interview: 10 marks
how_to_apply: Register with mobile number and complete the online application form
Fill in personal, educational, and residential details carefully
Submit the form online before the last date - 23-07-2026
Carry original documents to the respective ICDS Project Office for verification between 27-07-2026 and 05-08-2026

content_sections.heading: Telangana Anganwadi (AWT/ AWH) Nizamabad Recruitment 2026 Overview

rows.women_development_child_welfare_disabled: Intermediate (12th) pass; 10th pass considered if eligible candidates unavailable

content_sections.heading: Important Dates
content_sections.text: Starting Date for Apply Online: 08-07-2026 Last Date for Apply Online: 23-07-2026 Document Verification at ICDS Project Offices: 27-07-2026 to 05-08-2026

content_sections.heading: Nizamabad Anganwadi Vacancy 2026 – Post Details
content_sections.text: The department is filling vacancies at Anganwadi Centres (AWCs) across the district. The vacancy break-up is as follows: Anganwadi Teacher (AWT): 76 posts Anganwadi Helper (AWH): 103 posts (majority reserved for ST category, largely in Thanda/tribal hamlet areas) Project-wise AWCs include: ICDS Armoor, ICDS Bheemgal, ICDS Bodhan, ICDS Dichpally, and ICDS Nizamabad, with individual vacancies notified against specific Anganwadi Centre codes (AWC ID) and reservation categories (OC, BC-A/B/C/D/E, SC, ST, EWS, Ex-Servicemen, VH, HH, etc.)

content_sections.heading: Who Can Apply for Nizamabad Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
content_sections.text: AWT Posts: Candidates who have passed Intermediate (12th class) AWH Posts: Candidates who have passed Intermediate; if not available, 10th class pass candidates will be considered Age: 18 to 35 years as on 01-07-2026 Domicile Requirement: Candidate must belong to the same Ward/Division (Municipal Areas) or Gram Panchayat (Rural Areas) as the concerned Anganwadi Centre

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Merit list prepared out of total 70 marks based on qualifying certificate Additional weightage marks: Widow / Divorced / Abandoned women: 5 marks Orphan (as per JJ Act 2015): 5 marks Disabled candidates: 5 marks District Selection Committee Interview: 10 marks

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for Nizamabad Anganwadi Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official website wdcw.tg.nic.in Register with mobile number and complete the online application form Fill in personal, educational, and residential details carefully Submit the form online before the last date - 23-07-2026 Carry original documents to the respective ICDS Project Office for verification between 27-07-2026 and 05-08-2026

faq.question: Q1. What is Telangana Nizamabad Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The Telangana Nizamabad Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 has been announced by the Department of Women Development, Child Welfare, Disabled & Senior Citizens to fill 179 vacancies for Anganwadi Teacher (AWT) and Anganwadi Helper (AWH) posts. The recruitment is being conducted for various ICDS projects in Nizamabad district. Eligible women candidates can apply online through the official WDCW Telangana website within the prescribed dates.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in Nizamabad Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 179 vacancies have been released, including 76 Anganwadi Teacher (AWT) posts and 103 Anganwadi Helper (AWH) posts. Most of the Helper vacancies are reserved for the ST category in Thanda and tribal hamlet areas. The vacancies are distributed across the ICDS projects of Armoor, Bheemgal, Bodhan, Dichpally, and Nizamabad.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Telangana Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: For Anganwadi Teacher (AWT) posts, candidates must have passed Intermediate (12th Class) from a recognized board. For Anganwadi Helper (AWH) posts, Intermediate-qualified candidates will be given preference, and if eligible candidates are unavailable, 10th pass candidates may also be considered. Applicants should carefully verify the educational requirements before applying.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for Nizamabad Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for the recruitment should be 18 to 35 years of age as on 01 July 2026. Applicants must satisfy the age criteria mentioned in the official notification. Any age relaxation, if applicable, will be provided according to the Telangana Government recruitment rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for Telangana Nizamabad Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is based on a 70-mark merit system prepared from the qualifying examination marks. Additional weightage is provided to widows, divorced or abandoned women, orphans, and persons with disabilities. Eligible candidates will also appear before the District Selection Committee Interview, which carries 10 marks.

faq.question: Q6. What are the important dates for Telangana Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application process starts on 08 July 2026 and closes on 23 July 2026. Document verification for shortlisted candidates will be conducted at the respective ICDS Project Offices from 27 July 2026 to 05 August 2026. Candidates should complete the application well before the last date.

faq.question: Q7. Who can apply for Telangana Nizamabad Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Only eligible women candidates who satisfy the educational qualification, age limit, and domicile conditions can apply. Applicants must belong to the same Gram Panchayat in rural areas or the same Ward/Division in municipal areas where the concerned Anganwadi Centre is located. Candidates who do not meet the local residence requirement will not be considered.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for Telangana Nizamabad Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates need to visit the official WDCW Telangana website and complete the online registration process using a valid mobile number. After entering personal, educational, and residential details, applicants must submit the application online before 23 July 2026. They should also attend document verification with original certificates on the scheduled dates.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required for Telangana Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applicants should keep their educational certificates, proof of age, residence certificate, caste certificate (if applicable), and other supporting documents ready while applying. Original documents must be produced during the document verification process at the concerned ICDS Project Office. Failure to produce valid documents may lead to rejection of candidature.
